notes: v1.6.99 — HUD REDESIGN: SKYLINE · TRACE · TILES. Design principle: stop drawing abstract charts, draw the data center — progress renders as the physical objects techs think in, all three surfaces sharing ONE bottom-up fill metaphor (new hud_rackFill helper maps a deploy_computeRackRollup result to {state,fill%}: blocked/done/active/pending, pending gets an 8% visibility floor) and the existing token set. NOTE: web-Claude authored this spec as 'v1.6.97' but that number + v1.6.98 were already shipped (asset TAG + Troubleshoot Assistant), so this ships as v1.6.99 — version-collision resolved. SURFACE 1 — COMPLETION RING -> RACK SKYLINE (today_render NOW card): the deployment's racks as bottom-up fill bars (left ~60%, one tappable .sky-col per rack -> deploy_showRackDetail), readout stack right ~40% (the ONE big % + 'X of Y racks done' + P/Q phases + name + #id disambiguator kept from v1.6.95 + blocked badge when nonzero). Bars scale via flex (max-width 34px so 1 rack never balloons, min-width 4px so 16+ stay readable as texture, no horizontal scroll); active bar has a 1px scan-line shimmer (skyScan) gated by prefers-reduced-motion; blocked bar gets a red top-cap. Reads rollup.rackRollups (same rollup as the cards above). SURFACE 2 — PHASE PIPELINE -> ENERGIZED TRACE (deploy_showDetail): 5 node ports (18px diamonds) on a 2px conduit run; trace segment INTO a node energizes (is-hot) when that phase is reached, node lit on complete (kpi-ok green) / soft-pulsing on active (tracePulse, reduced-motion -> static bright+ring) / red on blocked; micro-mono labels under each node (truncate to fit five across); the 'P/Q PHASES' + overall % footer line stays. Same roll.phaseAgg. SURFACE 3 — FLOOR MAP -> FIXED TILES (deploy_renderFloorMap): replaced the auto-layout that inflated 1 rack into a giant aspect-ratio:1 box (the core defect) with fixed-proportion tiles (.tile-grid repeat(auto-fill,minmax(96px,120px)), aspect 1:1.6) grouped under ROW headers derived from the cab-ID prefix before ':' (same rule as mscope_groupByRow); tile anatomy = cab-ID header + mini bottom-up elevation fill (same hud_rackFill metaphor/colors as the skyline) + 5 phase micro-pips (from rollup.phases statuses) + status underline + red corner flag when blocked; tap -> deploy_showRackDetail; AUTO-LAYOUT disclosure + cols/rows math + cold-aisle divider removed (the fixed grid IS the layout). SHARED: tokens only (kpi glow ladder, Orbitron/mono fonts, existing card borders), no new colors/fonts; prefers-reduced-motion has a static equivalent for every pulse/shimmer; tap targets >=44px (sky-col 72px tall, tiles min var(--tap-xl)); all three read the SAME v1.6.95 resolver rollup (no new math, no parallel computation). PRESENTATION-ONLY: no data/storage/machinery changes. Inert leftovers (deferred trivial cleanup): _floorMap_calcCols + a 'var dep' in the floor map are now unused. New CSS block-0 braces 2505 -> 2565 (+60 this ship; cumulative 2494 -> 2565, new baseline 2565), balanced. node --check 2/2 + sw.js OK, JSON valid, three stamps v1.6.99. Built in Claude Code on e7e26c9 (v1.6.98) per the one-builder rule; web-Claude post-merge parity review pending. ON-DEVICE SCREENSHOT PASS PENDING (John): NOW skyline card, phase trace, rack grid — the three shots that prompted this ship, plus 1/3/20+-rack skyline scaling, blocked states, and the one-rack-tile defect-fix screenshot-compare; watch potential visual overlap between the new skyline and the existing RACK STATUS rail directly below it.
